sub_pixel_system.notes: Not documented - RTS game, sub-pixel precision not typically relevant

special_mechanics.name: Unit Movement Systems
special_mechanics.description: Different factions use distinct propulsion systems - Crayven Corporation units use traditional ballistics and movement with heavy armor focus; Order of the New Dawn units use hover propulsion system for increased speed and mobility

physics_values.hover_vs_traditional: Qualitative difference - hover units faster and more mobile
physics_values.armor_impact: Heavy armor reduces movement speed relative to lighter units

special_mechanics.name: Terrain-Based Tactics
special_mechanics.description: High ground provides tactical vantage point, affects accuracy and sight range. Stealth uses shadows and foliage for camouflage. Suppressive fire affects unit accuracy without necessarily causing damage

physics_values.flanking_mechanics: Armored units weaker to side/rear/top attacks vs frontal

tier_notes: Tier 3 - RTS game with no documented character/unit movement physics values. Source material focuses on gameplay mechanics, squad composition, and tactical elements rather than numerical physics parameters. Unit movement appears faction-differentiated (hover vs traditional) but no quantitative values provided.
